mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (g_code, reservation_no, r_code, booker_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, original_price, discount_rate, final_price) VALUES(#{g_code}, #{reservation_no}, #{r_code}, #{booker_name}, #{check_in_date}, #{check_out_date}, #{original_price}, #{discount_rate}, #{final_price})

INSERT INTO reservation (m_code, reservation_no, r_code, booker_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, original_price, discount_rate, coupon_used, final_price) VALUES(#{m_code}, #{reservation_no}, #{r_code}, #{booker_name}, #{check_in_date}, #{check_out_date}, #{original_price}, #{discount_rate}, #{coupon_used}, #{final_price})
mapper.select: SELECT h.hotelName, r.roomName, re.check_in_date, re.check_out_date, re.original_price, re.discount_rate, re.coupon_used, re.final_price, re.booker_name, re.reserved_at, re.reservation_no FROM reservation re INNER JOIN room r ON r.r_code = re.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code WHERE TRIM(re.reservation_no) = TRIM(#{reservation_no})

SELECT h.hotelName, r.roomName, re.check_in_date, re.check_out_date, re.original_price, re.discount_rate, re.coupon_used, re.final_price, re.booker_name, re.reserved_at, re.reservation_no FROM reservation re INNER JOIN room r ON r.r_code = re.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code INNER JOIN guest g ON g.g_code = re.g_code WHERE TRIM(re.reservation_no) = TRIM(#{reservation_no}) AND TRIM(g.g_phone) = TRIM(#{g_phone}) AND g.g_check = 0

SELECT * FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code LEFT JOIN room rm on rm.r_code = r.r_code LEFT JOIN hotel h on rm.h_code = h.h_code ORDER BY re_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation
booker_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
reservation_no LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code LEFT JOIN room rm on rm.r_code = r.r_code LEFT JOIN hotel h on rm.h_code = h.h_code
booker_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
reservation_no LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY r.re_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE g_code > 0

SELECT * FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code LEFT JOIN room rm on rm.r_code = r.r_code LEFT JOIN hotel h on rm.h_code = h.h_code WHERE r.g_code > 0 ORDER BY r.re_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation
WHERE g_code > 0 AND
booker_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
reservation_no LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code LEFT JOIN room rm on rm.r_code = r.r_code LEFT JOIN hotel h on rm.h_code = h.h_code
WHERE r.g_code > 0 AND
booker_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
reservation_no LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY re_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE m_code > 0

SELECT * FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code LEFT JOIN room rm on rm.r_code = r.r_code LEFT JOIN hotel h on rm.h_code = h.h_code WHERE r.m_code > 0 ORDER BY r.re_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation
WHERE m_code > 0 AND
booker_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
reservation_no LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code LEFT JOIN room rm on rm.r_code = r.r_code LEFT JOIN hotel h on rm.h_code = h.h_code
WHERE r.m_code > 0 AND
booker_name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
reservation_no LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY re_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET review_status = 2 WHERE DATE_ADD(check_out_date, INTERVAL 2 DAY) < CURDATE() AND review_status = 0
UPDATE reservation r LEFT JOIN member m on r.m_code = m.m_code LEFT JOIN guest g on r.g_code = g.g_code SET r.cancel = 1, r.cancel_date = now(), g.g_check = 1 WHERE r.re_code=#{re_code}
UPDATE reservation SET review_status = 1 WHERE re_code = #{re_code}
